---
name: Suggest a skill
about: Propose a new PM skill or workflow for Shipwright
title: "[Skill] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Skill name
<!-- What would you call this skill? e.g., "Stakeholder Interview Synthesis" -->

## Category
<!-- Which category does it fit? discovery, strategy, execution, gtm, measurement, customer-intelligence, technical, planning, pricing, communication, or new? -->

## What it does
<!-- One paragraph: what does this skill produce and when would a PM use it? -->

## Framework or methodology
<!-- What established PM framework is it based on? e.g., "Teresa Torres' Continuous Discovery" or "Reforge Growth Loops" -->

## Example output
<!-- Optional: what would the output look like? A table? A document? A matrix? -->

## Why it's missing
<!-- Optional: why do you think this should be part of Shipwright? What gap does it fill? -->
